description: Your client is planning a major website redesign of books.toscrape.com and needs a comprehensive technical SEO baseline documenting the site's current state before migration begins. Using Screaming Frog SEO Spider, crawl books.toscrape.com completely. Export the following data as CSV files to ~/Documents/SEO/exports/: Internal HTML data as baseline_internal_html.csv, Page Titles data as baseline_page_titles.csv, Meta Description data as baseline_meta_descriptions.csv, Images data as baseline_images.csv, and All Inlinks as baseline_all_inlinks.csv. Write a migration baseline report to ~/Documents/SEO/reports/migration_baseline_report.txt containing: the exact total number of indexable HTML pages crawled, the exact count of pages with missing page titles, the exact count of pages with duplicate page titles, the exact count of pages with missing meta descriptions, the exact count of images with missing alt text, and the top 3 on-page SEO issues ranked by number of affected pages, each with a specific migration risk assessment and remediation recommendation. All counts in the report must be exact values from the actual crawl data, not estimates. Login: user=ga.
